A2124E Patient Trans - Other Methods CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates that the route(s) of transmission of the current reconciled medication list to the resident/family/caregiver was an other method (e.g., texting, email, CDs) 0=No
1=Yes effective 10/01/2023
864 HLTH_LITERACY_CD HLTH_LITERACY_CD B1300 Health Literacy CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates how often the resident needs to have someone help them when they read instructions, pamphlets, or other written material from
